name: dataproduct-builder-demo
description: Demo-grade builder for Snowflake dbt data products with Entropy Data.

interface.shortDescription: Demo builder for Snowflake dbt data products.
interface.longDescription: Streamlined demo plugin that scaffolds a Snowflake dbt project for a published Entropy Data data product, generates the output-port models from the ODCS contract, runs dbt with OpenLineage, runs dbt and data contract tests, and seeds a GitHub Actions reference workflow. Two skills: dataproduct-bootstrap and dataproduct-implement.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap a Snowflake dbt data product.
